scripts.dev:native:cached: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_ENABLE_ENGINE_CACHE='1'; if (-not $env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_CACHE_DIR) { $env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_CACHE_DIR = (Join-Path $PWD 'artifacts/trt_cache') }; npx --prefix ui tauri dev --features native_engine"
scripts.build:native:cached: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_ENABLE_ENGINE_CACHE='1'; if (-not $env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_CACHE_DIR) { $env:VIDEOFORGE_TRT_CACHE_DIR = (Join-Path $PWD 'artifacts/trt_cache') }; npx --prefix ui tauri build --features native_engine"
